confirm.title: NSPanel HAUI devices discovered
confirm.description: Found {count} ESPHome device(s) running HAUI firmware: {names}. Add them to a new NSPanel HAUI hub? Devices stay disabled until you enable them in the HAUI Editor.

select_devices.title: Select NSPanel Devices
select_devices.description: Found {count} ESPHome device(s). {esphome_info} Pick which ones belong to this hub. Per-device and panel settings are managed in the NSPanel HAUI — HAUI Editor in the sidebar.

data_description.selected_devices: ESPHome devices discovered on your network.

abort.already_configured: A hub with this name is already configured
abort.already_in_progress: A hub configuration is already in progress
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one NSPanel HAUI hub is supported
abort.no_devices_found: No NSPanel HAUI devices were detected. Install the HAUI firmware on an ESPHome device first.

init.title: NSPanel HAUI Hub Settings
init.description: Runtime options for this hub. Per-device and panel settings live in the NSPanel HAUI — HAUI Editor.

data_description.update_interval: How often the integration polls panel state (5-300 s).
data_description.debug: Verbose debug logging for this hub.

open_panel.name: Open panel
open_panel.description: Navigate to a specific panel.  If wakeup is enabled the display wakes first.

panel.name: Panel
panel.description: Panel key or UUID to navigate to (e.g. 'alarm', 'grid_0').

wakeup.name: Wake up first
wakeup.description: Wake the display before opening the panel.

close_panel.name: Close panel
close_panel.description: Close the current panel and return to the previous or home panel.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to close the panel on.

wakeup.name: Wake up
wakeup.description: Wake the display and navigate to the wakeup or home panel.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to put to sleep.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to set brightness on.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Send a raw Nextion display command to the device.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to send the command to.

goto_page.name: Go to page
goto_page.description: Switch to a Nextion page by its numeric page ID (low-level).

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to switch pages on.

page.name: Page ID
page.description: Numeric Nextion page ID to switch to.

send_notification.name: Send notification
send_notification.description: Show a notification on the panel with a title, message and icon.

title.name: Title
title.description: Notification title shown on the panel.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: Material Design Icon shown with the notification (e.g. 'mdi:bell').

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds until auto-dismiss. 0 keeps it until dismissed.

persistent.name: Persistent
persistent.description: Require dismissal on the panel to stop the alert sound.

play_rtttl.name: Play RTTTL tune
play_rtttl.description: Play a ringtone on the panel buzzer from an RTTTL string.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to play the tune on.

play_sound.name: Play sound
play_sound.description: Play a named built-in sound on the panel buzzer.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to play the sound on.

name.name: Sound name
name.description: Name of the built-in sound to play.

reset_last_interaction.name: Reset last interaction
reset_last_interaction.description: Reset the panel idle timer as if the user just touched it.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: NSPanel device to reset the idle timer on.

offset.name: Offset
offset.description: Offset in seconds applied to the reset point.
